files.patch:
@@ -20,8 +20,7 @@ jobs:
         run: go mod download
       - name: Test (coverage >= 90%)
         run: ./scripts/check-coverage.sh
+      - name: Install golangci-lint
+        run: go install github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/v2/cmd/golangci-lint@v2.7.2
       - name: Lint
-        uses: golangci/golangci-lint-action@v6
-        with:
-          version: latest
-          args: --timeout=5m
+        run: make lint
